name: coconote-mcp
description: MCP stdio server that lets AI agents read and edit a Coconote vault

scripts.build:
esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --loader:.md=text --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate "--banner:js=#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild node_modules/pdfjs-dist/legacy/build/pdf.worker.mjs --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/pdf.worker.mjs
